title: WWE 2K26 Patch 1.07: Huge Changes Coming to Universe Mode and Draft and not only
description: WWE 2K26 Patch 1.07 is officially live! Discover the biggest changes to Universe Mode, stamina tweaks, and the new in-game draft fixes you need to know about.
excerpt: The massive update we've been waiting for is finally here. WWE 2K26 Patch 1.07 overhauls Universe Mode booking, fixes stamina drain, and repairs the broken draft system. Here is the full breakdown.
content:
The wait is finally over. After the incredibly light 1.06 maintenance update, 2K has finally dropped the massive patch the community has been begging for. WWE 2K26 Patch 1.07 is officially live, bringing crucial gameplay tweaks, massive Universe Mode overhauls, and some much-needed fixes to the in-game Draft system.

Before you boot up your save file, here is a breakdown of the biggest changes you need to know about.

Major Gameplay & Stamina Tweaks

If you were getting frustrated by your superstar getting "Winded" in the first two minutes of a match, this update is for you. 2K has adjusted stamina costs to increase much more gradually over the duration of a bout. Even better, reversals now cost less stamina when you are fighting more than one opponent—an absolute game-changer for Fatal 4-Ways and Handicap matches.

The update also snuck in some new animations, including Chelsea Green's Cradle Flatliner and a new crowd/wake-up taunt for Solo Sikoa, alongside improved AI that actually attempts reversals after transitioning from front to rear.

Universe Mode Gets Saved

Universe Mode players, rejoice. This patch didn't just fix bugs; it added completely new options to give you more control over your booking:

  • New "Wear and Tear" Option: You can now allow superstars to remain damaged if you book them multiple times on the same show.
  • Rivalry Breaks & PLE Priorities: A new option allows you to control whether rivalry matches or #1 contender matches get priority at Premium Live Events.
  • Game-Breaking Bugs Squashed: The game will no longer announce the wrong winner after a Royal Rumble or Gauntlet match. They also fixed the issue where vacant custom championships were being randomly removed from shows, and the MITB cash-in prompt will no longer stay stuck on your screen after triggering.

In-Game Draft Fixes

For those using the in-game draft feature, Patch 1.07 addressed several massive headaches. The developers fixed the bug causing Legends to completely vanish from the draft pool, stopped drafts from completing prematurely, and fixed the logic so rivalries actually clear when superstars are drafted to opposing brands. You can also finally view previous draft results directly from the select screen.

Take Your Draft to the Next Level

While Patch 1.07 makes the in-game draft much more stable, it still lacks the ability to do a proper, live draft against your friends online. If you want the ultimate GM experience without fighting the game's menus, you need to take your booking outside the game.

Use our Free Multiplayer Draft Tool. Create a custom lobby, send the room code to your friend, and do a live, turn-based draft right from your phone or PC. It's the perfect way to build your post-Patch 1.07 Universe Mode!

title: WWE 2K26 basic storylines that will spice up your Universe Mode
description: Tired of boring AI auto-booking? Discover 4 high-stakes storylines, from 'The Gatekeeper' to 'The Rumble Betrayal', to completely spice up your WWE 2K26 Universe Mode.
excerpt: Stop letting the in-game AI ruin your WrestleMania card. From creating a mid-card 'Gatekeeper' to booking the ultimate 'Rumble Betrayal', here are 4 basic storylines that will instantly revive your Universe Mode save.
content:
If you are letting the in-game AI book your WWE 2K26 Universe Mode, you are missing out on the best part of the game. Auto-booking inevitably leads to the same repetitive matches, random tag team breakups, and a completely stale WrestleMania card.

To keep your save file engaging, you need to take control and introduce some long-term, high-stakes booking. Here are 4 basic, yet incredibly effective storylines that will instantly spice up your Universe Mode.

1. The Gatekeeper

World titles usually get all the glory, but you can easily make your mid-card titles feel just as prestigious. Put the Intercontinental or United States Championship on a brutal, hard-hitting striker—think Bron Breakker, Ilja Dragunov, or Gunther.

Instead of having them drop the belt to chase the World Title, make them a permanent roadblock. Have them actively refuse to step up to the main event picture, choosing instead to hold the mid-card hostage. Use them to "torture" and test every single new NXT call-up. Nobody moves up the card until they survive The Gatekeeper.

2. The Title Collector (The Final Boss)

Every great Universe Mode needs an absolute final boss. Keep a mid-card title on your most dominant heel. But instead of keeping them in their lane, have them enter and win the Royal Rumble while still holding that championship.

This sets up a massive WrestleMania main event where they win the World Title, holding both divisions hostage at the exact same time. It creates a desperate, months-long storyline where the rest of your roster has to team up just to dethrone the ultimate tyrant.

3. The Rumble Betrayal

Stop letting the game break up your favorite tag teams with those generic, random weekly show cutscenes. If a beloved tag team is going to split, it needs to hurt.

Have a popular team (like The New Day or DIY) lose their tag team belts. Then, enter them both into the Royal Rumble match. Here is the fun part: pick up your controller, actively play as one of the partners, and manually eliminate your teammate from behind when they aren't looking. This instantly sets up a bitter, deeply personal blood feud for WrestleMania without relying on broken AI cutscenes.

4. The Last Ride

Your roster is full of aging legends, but they usually just end up wrestling meaningless matches on weekly TV. It’s time to give them a proper, high-stakes send-off.

Take a veteran like Randy Orton, Rey Mysterio, or John Cena, and have them put their actual career on the line for one final World Title run at WrestleMania. If they win, they get one last glorious reign. If they lose, you must honor the stipulation: manually move them to the Alumni roster and never use them in your Universe Mode again.

Need to set up the perfect roster for these storylines?
A great storyline needs the right cast of characters. Before you start your next Universe year, grab a friend and use our Free Multiplayer Draft Tool. Do a live online draft, split your rosters perfectly, and start building these epic rivalries today!

title: WWE 2K26 Universe Mode Guide: How to keep your Universe Mode entertaining
description: Bored of your WWE 2K26 Universe Mode? Discover 5 proven booking tips to keep your save file fresh, realistic, and unpredictable all year long.
excerpt: Hitting a wall after your first WrestleMania? From 'Loser Leaves Town' matches to custom drafts, here are 5 proven booking strategies to inject life back into your WWE 2K26 Universe Mode.
content:
We've all been there: you spend hours setting up your WWE 2K26 Universe Mode, you play through a fantastic WrestleMania, and then... you hit a wall. By year two, the rivalries feel repetitive, the roster gets stale, and the auto-booking AI starts making zero sense. But you don't have to delete your save file just yet.

If you're looking to inject some life back into your save, here are 5 proven tips to keep your WWE 2K26 Universe Mode fresh, realistic, and unpredictable.

1. Do a Hard Reset with a Custom Draft

While WWE 2K26's new in-game Draft feature is actually great for quick roster shuffles, it lacks the depth needed for a complete overhaul. If your shows feel stagnant, you need a true "from scratch" experience.

Instead of relying on the game's limited logic, use the 2K HUB Draft Tool. You can generate a complete, randomized roster, set your own custom rules, balance your Heels and Faces, and build entirely new brands before manually assigning them in-game. A fresh roster creates instant, brand-new dream matches.

2. Track Your Booking Outside the Game

Let's be honest: the in-game menus aren't enough for long-term storylines. The game forgets rivalries the moment they end and does a poor job of tracking title prestige or win/loss records.

To keep yourself invested, you need to track your own canon. Use Excel spreadsheets, a dedicated notebook, or external tracking apps to log your title histories, win/loss stats, and future match cards. When you can actually see that a mid-carder is on a 10-match win streak, pushing them to the main event feels earned and realistic.

3. Raise the Stakes: "Loser Leaves Brand" Matches

Nothing kills the excitement of Universe Mode faster than seeing the same two superstars fight every week for three months straight. You need to add actual stakes to feuds that have been going on for too long.

Book a massive "Loser Leaves Town" match at your next Premium Live Event to blow off the rivalry. Once the match is over, manually trade the loser to Raw, SmackDown, or NXT. Not only does this give the winner a definitive victory, but it forces the loser to start fresh on a new show, instantly creating new matchups for both.

4. Create On-Screen Authority Figures

Universe Mode can sometimes feel lifeless without the backstage politics that make real-life WWE television so great. You can simulate this by giving your brands real authority figures.

Assign characters like Nick Aldis, Adam Pearce, or Paul Heyman as managers to your top corporate heels. Use them in your gameplay and storylines to simulate the authority "screwing over" your top babyfaces. Having a corrupt GM ringside constantly distracting the referee adds a whole new layer of frustration and drama to your weekly shows.

5. Completely Overhaul Your Mid-Card with Community Creations

The base game roster is massive, but it's just the foundation. If you're bored of the same faces, it's time to dive into Community Creations.

Download missing AEW or Indie CAWs (Create-A-Wrestlers), grab updated attires for your current champions, and download custom arenas. If your roster is getting too bloated, take those downloaded CAWs and custom championships to build an exclusive 3rd brand (like a revived ECW or an indie invasion show). A completely fresh mid-card will keep you playing for hundreds of hours.

Ready to hit the reset button on your Universe? Head over to our Draft Tool right now, select your rosters, and start booking your perfect season.

title: WWE 2K26 MyGM Guide
description: Master WWE 2K MyGM mode with proven draft strategies.
excerpt: Round-by-round draft strategy, budget allocation breakdowns, sleeper picks, and the Year 1 winning checklist. Everything you need to dominate MyGM from draft day to the Season Finale.
content:
WWE 2K26 has delivered the deepest MyGM experience in franchise history. With the introduction of grueling 50-week seasons, massive rosters, and the punishing Immortal difficulty, simply spamming Legends in Hell in a Cell matches won't cut it anymore. If you want to beat the AI and build a Hall of Fame brand, you need a flawless strategy from day one.

Here is your ultimate guide to dominating WWE 2K26 MyGM Mode, managing your budget, and booking five-star shows every week.

1. The Draft is Everything: Synergy Over Star Power

In previous years, you could win by simply drafting the most popular superstars. In a 50-week season, that strategy will bankrupt you. Your draft is the foundation of your entire year.

  • Focus on Class Pairings: The match rating engine still heavily favors specific class matchups. Always draft pairs that work well together (e.g., Bruiser vs. Fighter, Cruiser vs. Giant). A perfectly paired mid-card match will often outscore a main event between two mismatched main-eventers.
  • Role Balance: Ensure you have an equal number of Heels and Faces. Booking Face vs. Face or Heel vs. Heel will tank your match ratings and crowd engagement.
  • Plan Your Factions: With the addition of multi-man tag matches (up to 8-Way), drafting existing factions or building your own stable early on gives you massive booking flexibility for Premium Live Events (PLEs).

2. Managing Stamina in a 50-Week Season

The biggest mistake new GMs make in WWE 2K26 is burning out their top stars before WrestleMania. Stamina management is the real game on Immortal difficulty.

  • Use Double-Booking Wisely: You can now have a Superstar cut a promo AND wrestle a match in the exact same week. While great for a quick ratings boost, it drains their stamina heavily. If they get injured during the match, the promo is canceled. Save double-booking for crucial PLE weeks.
  • Rotate Your Roster: With larger budgets (up to $7 million), you should be drafting 20 to 35 superstars. Cycle your lower-card talent on weekly TV shows (Raw/SmackDown) and rest your main eventers.
  • Avoid Weekly Gimmick Matches: TLC, Extreme Rules, and Hell in a Cell matches should be extremely rare. Using them on normal weekly shows will result in injuries that derail your long-term storylines.

3. Exploit the New Match Types

WWE 2K26 finally unlocked the match card. You are no longer restricted to basic 1v1 or 2v2 bouts.

  • Cross-Brand 8-Way Matches: Use 5-Way, 6-Way, and 8-Way matches to get as many superstars on the card as possible during major events. This keeps morale high across the board without using up too many match slots.
  • Intergender Matches: These are now bookable but come with a small additional show cost. Use them strategically when you have a top-tier female superstar who needs a storyline, but your women's division is fatigued.

4. The Secret Weapon: Pre-Planning Your Roster

Trying to draft a 30+ person roster with a strict budget while a timer ticks down in-game is incredibly stressful. The best MyGM players plan their entire roster before they even boot up the mode.

This is where the 2KHUB Draft Tool becomes your ultimate advantage:

  • Mock Drafts: Use our Single Player tool to simulate your draft, balance your budget, and visualize your Heel/Face and Class synergies before committing in-game.
  • Multiplayer Leagues: If you're playing MyGM against friends, bypass the in-game limitations entirely. Hop into our Multiplayer Draft Lobby, claim your brand, and do a live, custom draft with your own rules.

Stop leaving your WrestleMania main event to chance. Use the 2KHUB tools to build your dynasty today.

title: WWE 2K26 Update 1.06 is Live: Small Fixes Now, Huge Changes Coming Next
description: What's new in the WWE 2K26 1.06 Update and what's coming next? Patch notes breakdown, ongoing Universe Mode bugs, and everything we know about the upcoming 1.07 update.
excerpt: Patch 1.06 is live but light — just stability fixes. Here's what's still broken in Universe Mode, and why the real news is the confirmed 1.07 update that's coming next.
content:
What's Actually in Patch 1.06?

If you were hoping for a massive content drop or a major gameplay overhaul, you might want to lower your expectations. The official WWE 2K26 Patch 1.06 is incredibly light, with the only official note being a generic "Stability and Performance Improvements." It's a standard maintenance patch designed to clean up server issues and prepare the backend for bigger things to come.

The Elephant in the Room: Universe Mode Glitches

Despite the "stability" claims, the community is still very vocal about ongoing, game-breaking issues — particularly in Universe Mode. The most frustrating bug right now involves Rivalries glitching out. Players are reporting cutscenes failing to trigger, rivalries deleting themselves mid-month, or the game automatically booking the wrong superstars in rivalry matches, completely ruining long-term storylines.

  • Temporary Workaround — Until a real fix drops, many players are forced to rely on manual booking and tracking their rivalries outside the game to prevent the AI from ruining their WrestleMania builds.
  • Turn off Auto-Rivalries — For your most important main event feuds, we highly recommend turning off automatic rivalries entirely and booking the matches yourself.

The Good News: Update 1.07 is Coming

The real news from this update isn't what's in it, but what 2K announced at the very bottom of the notes. The development team officially confirmed they are "hard at work on the next major update (1.07) coming soon that addresses a variety of items across multiple game modes."

This is the massive patch we've been waiting for. We expect major bug fixes for both Universe Mode and MyGM, potential gameplay tuning, and hopefully, a permanent fix to the broken rivalry system. Stay tuned, as we will break down the full 1.07 patch notes the moment they drop.

Keep Your Universe Running with 2KHUB

While we wait for 2K to fix the in-game booking logic, you don't have to put your Universe Mode or MyGM on hold. You can take full control of your experience right now.

  • Use the 2KHUB Draft Tool to manually track your rosters, ensuring your brands stay balanced even when the game's AI acts up.
  • Since in-game rivalries are currently bugged, grab a friend, hop into a live Multiplayer Draft, and book your shows manually using our platform as your ultimate GM companion.
